title: Collectible Figure Packaging Poster AI
sourceTitle: Collectible Figure Packaging Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-finish 4:5 collectible figure packaging poster built around 23-30-year-old adult East Asian woman with soft clean features, high ponytail, natural smile, and refined first-love fashion mood, presented as a premium feminine commercial product box. Subject: 23-30-year-old adult East Asian woman with soft clean features, high ponytail, natural smile, and refined first-love fashion mood stands in the central transparent blister display area wearing white fitted U-neck short-sleeve top, lavender high-waist skirt-shorts, white sneakers, and pearl-lavender mini bag, with polished adult fashion styling, natural proportions, and refined collectible figure presence. Scene: A complete premium packaging box with transparent molded plastic, lavender side information panel, silver trim lines, pearl-white background, and separate accessory compartments containing lavender quilted mini bag, purple straw cup, First Love card booklet, violet perfume bottle, hand cream, lip gloss, heart sunglasses, and white sneakers. Composition: Fixed 4:5 commercial packaging layout: central figure window, right-side accessory slots, left-side information column, clear plastic reflections, barcode area, edition details, and balanced product-box hierarchy. Signature Elements: Preserved collectible figure packaging poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-end collectible toy packaging, fashion-character product visualization, dreamy feminine boutique packaging, realistic plastic blister reflections, commercial display lighting, and premium poster polish. Color Palette: Fixed pearl white, lavender purple, soft silver, translucent plastic highlights, and clean pastel commercial tones. Lighting: Soft clean commercial packaging light, clear plastic edge highlights, natural face light, controlled reflections, and crisp product-box readability. Typography: FIRST LOVE COLLECTION, SERIES First Love COLLECTIBLE FIGURE No. FL-0715, and LIMITED EDITION 1 OF 2000 appear as readable premium packaging typography with barcode and small product-tag details arranged cleanly. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
